Star

summary: 该项目汇集了100多个可直接运行的AI智能体与RAG应用案例，通过提供可复现的实践项目助力开发者快速构建和部署大语言模型应用。

name: hallmark
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        Nutlope /

      hallmark  

    
      Anti-AI-slop design skill for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.
summary: Hallmark 是一个为 AI 编程工具设计的反 AI 垃圾风格 CSS 框架，值得关注因为它能帮助开发者生成更干净、专业的代码样式。

name: graphify
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        Graphify-Labs /

      graphify  

    
      AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.
summary: 该项目能将代码、文档、数据库等各类文件转换为可查询的知识图谱，让开发人员通过统一视图管理整个技术栈。

name: airi
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        moeru-ai /

      airi  

    
      💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.
summary: Airi是一个自托管的虚拟伴侣项目，能够实现实时语音聊天和游戏交互，并支持多平台使用，因其高度自主的交互能力而值得关注。

name: Raphire
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        Raphire /

      Win11Debloat  

    
      A simple, lightweight PowerShell script that allows you to remove pre-installed apps, disable telemetry, as well as perform various other changes to declutter and customize your Windows experience. Win11Debloat works for both Windows 10 and Windows 11.
summary: 这是一个用于清理和自定义Windows系统的PowerShell脚本，能移除预装应用并禁用遥测功能，值得关注的是它同时支持Windows 10和11系统且操作轻便高效。

name: Vibe-Trading
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        HKUDS /

      Vibe-Trading  

    
      "Vibe-Trading: Your Personal Trading Agent"
summary: Vibe-Trading是一个基于Python的个人量化交易代理项目，它能自动执行交易策略并优化投资组合，值得关注因其将AI与金融结合实现了智能自动化交易。
